job_description: I supported the development and maintenance of WordPress websites by implementing structured data (schema markup) to enhance SEO and configuring plugins to ensure proper site functionality. I reviewed and resolved layout and spacing issues to improve UI consistency and user experience, while adjusting page designs using Beaver Builder. Additionally, I ensured responsive behavior across different screen sizes to deliver a seamless experience on all devices.

I developed and maintained eCommerce stores using BigCommerce and Shopify, aligning with client requirements and ensuring modern, optimized storefronts through theme migrations and updates. To enhance site functionality, I implemented custom scripts and resolved technical issues while applying SEO best practices. I also managed the company’s WordPress website by adding new pages and integrating additional features.

Completed an intensive front-end development training program with a focus on React.js and Angular.js frameworks. Demonstrated proficiency through successful completion of technical assessments and active participation in Agile Scrum ceremonies. Gained hands-on experience developing responsive, modern user interfaces aligned with current industry standards.

Participated in the Accenture Technology Learning Program (ATLP), a structured training initiative focused on web development using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Git, and responsive design. Strengthened practical skills through guided projects and assessments. Built a full-stack file repository using React, Node.js, and MongoDB.
